title: I Graded the Official MCP Servers. The Fetch One Has a Prompt Override.
bsky_text:
I graded all 6 remaining official MCP reference servers.

time: B-
memory: C+
git: A (93.1)
fetch: C (has a prompt override in its description)
sequentialthinking: C+ (283 tokens, 1 tool)
filesystem: D+

only one A. fetch has a prompt override. these are the schemas everyone copies. {url}
